title: EBTA incubation and live plan (G12/G13 preregistration form)
description: Formulaire G12/G13 : plan d'incubation et de passage live preregistre avant VALIDATION_READY. Source: SOP 11; DN-035, DN-036, DN-037; PAQUET D'EXECUTION section 1.
x_normative_source: Protocole/PAQUET D'EXECUTION EBTA.md section 1 (G12/G13 form) and section 2 (G12, G13 checklists); SOP 11; DN-035, DN-036, DN-037

declared_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp; must be declared before VALIDATION_READY stage (DN-035).

duration_days_minimum.description: Minimum number of paper trading days required before live approval.

success_criteria.description: Preregistered criteria for paper trading success.

process_frozen.description: True confirms the process is deployed as-is without alpha repair (DN-035).

monitoring.description: Preregistered monitoring plan (DN-037): statistical monitoring that controls repeated consultations.

type.description: Type of monitoring. SEQUENTIAL_PROCEDURE must use alpha-spending or an equivalent preregistered stopping rule.

schedule_or_procedure.description: Description of the monitoring schedule or sequential stopping rule.

alpha_spending_function.description: Required when type is SEQUENTIAL_PROCEDURE (e.g., O'Brien-Fleming, Pocock).

max_consultations.description: Maximum number of monitoring lookups before final decision.

operational_alerts.description: Preregistered conditions for operational alerts (drawdown, capacity breach, data anomaly).

initial_capital_limit.description: Capital limit for initial live deployment (must be within validated capacity, DN-029).

capital_progression_rule.description: Preregistered rule for increasing capital, conditional on capacity validation.

sizing_policy.description: Reference to the preregistered sizing policy.

kill_switch_condition.description: Preregistered condition that triggers immediate halt of live trading.

live_version_id.description: Exact process version to be deployed live (must match DEPLOYMENT_CERTIFIED package).

suspension_and_exit_criteria.description: Preregistered criteria for suspension, resumption, or permanent exit.

suspension_conditions.description: Conditions triggering temporary suspension of live trading.

resumption_conditions.description: Conditions required for safe resumption after suspension.

exit_conditions.description: Conditions triggering permanent withdrawal and archiving.
